note_main_file: id=81 Improved Corruption (spec_tree=-1) — Corruption flags=[2,0,0] CONFIRMED CORRECT via .spellinfo all 172.
id=83 Improved Life Tap (spec_tree=-1) — Life Tap flags=[262144,0,0] CONFIRMED. Main-file had WRONG flags [0,64,0]; corrected.
_notes.note_suppression: Suppression (id=260) and Shadow Mastery (id=264) use all-ones because 'Affliction' and 'Shadow school' are not addressable by Warlock family SpellMod as a subset — no shared Affliction-only bit exists.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Warlock family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

confirmed_flags.Shadow_Bolt_686: [1,0,0] = 0x00000001 (mask0 bit0) — also verifies main-file id=80 CORRECT
confirmed_flags.Life_Tap_1454: [262144,0,0] = 0x00040000 (mask0 bit18) — main-file id=83 was [0,64,0] WRONG; corrected

talent_affixes.name: Suppression
talent_affixes.notes: Affliction spell hit chance +1%/rank (RESIST_MISS_CHANCE FLAT: 1=+1% hit). All-ones used — 'Affliction' is not a targetable spell sub-type in Warlock family SpellMod; acceptable scope for Affliction spec affixes.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Corruption
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=0x00000002 (mask0 bit1). Corruption cast time -400ms/rank (max 5/5 = instant).

talent_affixes.name: Improved Curse of Weakness
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[32768,0,0]=0x8000 (mask0 bit15). No shared Warlock marker bits. CoW armor-reduction EFFECT1 +5%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Drain Soul (2r, tier 2) — Increases damage of Drain Soul when target is below 25% HP. HP-conditional damage bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Life Tap
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[262144,0,0]=0x00040000 (mask0 bit18). Life Tap mana return +10%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Soul Siphon (2r, tier 2) — Increases damage done by Drain Life and Drain Soul by 2/4% per Affliction effect on the target. Conditional (stacking debuff count), not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Fear
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,1024,0]=mask1 bit10 (0x00000400). No shared Warlock marker bits. Fear duration +1s/rank (DURATION FLAT: 1000=1s).

talent_affixes._todo: Fel Concentration (5r, tier 3) — Reduces pushback chance while channeling Drain Life/Drain Soul/Drain Mana by 14/28/42/56/70%. Pushback resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.
Amplify Curse (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Grim Reach (2r, tier 4) — Increases range of Affliction spells by 10/20%. RANGE SpellMod unit unclear (yards × ?); deferring until units confirmed in-game.
Nightfall (2r, tier 4) — Your Corruption and Drain Life have a 2/4% chance to proc Shadow Trance (instant Shadow Bolt). Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Empowered Corruption
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=0x00000002 (mask0 bit1). No shared Warlock marker bits. Corruption bonus damage from spell power +3%/rank (modeled as DAMAGE PCT).

talent_affixes._todo: Shadow Embrace (5r, tier 5) — Your Shadow Bolt and Haunt spells apply a stacking debuff reducing healing and physical damage. Target-side debuff mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Curse of Exhaustion (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Felhunter (2r, tier 5) — Reduces mana cost/cooldown of felhunter Shadow Bite. Pet ability, not player SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Shadow Mastery
talent_affixes.notes: All Shadow spell damage +2%/rank. All-ones used — 'Shadow school' cannot be targeted by Warlock family SpellMod as a subset; acceptable for Affliction spec affixes.

talent_affixes.name: Contagion
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1026,16,0]: OR of CoA(980) mask0 bit10(0x400=1024)|Corruption(172) mask0 bit1(0x2=2)|SoC(27243) mask1 bit4(0x10=16). No shared Warlock marker bits. DoT damage +1%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Dark Pact (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Howl of Terror
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,8,0]=mask1 bit3 (0x00000008). No shared Warlock marker bits. Howl of Terror cooldown -4s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -4000ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Death's Embrace (3r, tier 7) — Increases damage done by Shadow spells when player is below 35% HP, and increases life drain when target is below 25% HP. HP-threshold conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.
Eradication (3r, tier 7) — Your Corruption ticks have a 6/12/18% chance to increase cast speed by 20% for 8 sec. Proc-based haste, not implementable as SpellMod.
Pandemic (1r, tier 8) — Your Corruption and Unstable Affliction can now critically strike. Single-rank, excluded by design.
Everlasting Affliction (5r, tier 8) — Shadow Bolt, Haunt, Drain Soul refresh Corruption duration on target. Proc/reset mechanic on hit, not implementable as SpellMod.
Haunt (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Unstable Affliction (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
